_comment: Copy this file to wifi_credentials.json (drop the .example suffix; that name is gitignored) and fill in your home WiFi credentials. scripts/build/host_wifi.py reads wifi_credentials.json as the primary credentials source, with OS auto-detect as a fallback (modern macOS redacts SSIDs from non-sudo subprocesses; Linux NetworkManager needs sudo for the PSK; Windows netsh works without admin in most cases). Both files live next to host_wifi.py in scripts/build/. The example file stays in git; the real one never does.
